docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LODES, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL%SSCF-CITY ATTY-TRAC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LODES, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL%SSCF-CITY ATTY-TRAC THE BALANCE DUE ON ACCOUNT 0800027957A000 BDR RECORD NO. 1254116 IS $1200. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL%SSCF-CITY ATTY-TRAC HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL%SSCF-CITY ATTY-TRAC THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS CONSTITUTES A REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF WHICH IS OUTSIDE THE JURISDICTION OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
